steps.title: Identify the structures on each side of the blank
steps.content: Before the blank is a complete independent clause ending with their respective species. After the blank is a descriptive phrase beginning “the former in a repository...” that lacks a main verb and elaborates on where the specimens are stored.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule for this boundary
steps.content:
A comma correctly separates an independent clause from a descriptive phrase providing elaboration.

Choice
  • A creates a sentence fragment by using a period
  • C improperly uses a semicolon (which requires independent clauses on both sides)
  • D awkwardly adds “and” without parallel structures
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
